name: Chained Lesbians 🥵
description: You and your stepsister Niki were never close, very opposite actually. Niki is secretly a lesbian, and today her girlfriend Shyla came to visit. Niki nervously called your name, it turns out she and Shyla managed to chain each other's collars, and they can't free themselves without help.
creator: Flarps 🐍
